name: thinkingisfree
description: Bold typographic Ghost theme for independent creators

show_reading_time.description: Display estimated reading time on posts

show_scroll_progress.description: Show scroll progress bar at top of page

typography_style.description: Typography personality — heading weight variation (editorial, display with heavier weights, or minimal with lighter weights)

type_size.description: Typography size scale — sm (compact), md (balanced), lg (generous editorial)

type_spacing.description: Typography spacing — tight (compact density), normal (balanced), relaxed (open, airy)

page_width.description: Default maximum content width for all pages

page_hero_width.description: Page hero (header + feature image) layout: fullscreen or respecting page width

page_content_width.description: Page content layout: full width or respecting page width constraint

home_content_width.description: Homepage sections (carousel, testimonials, etc.) layout: full width or respecting page width

footer_width.description: Footer layout: full width or respecting page width

hero_name.description: Top label shown above the headline, e.g. Hello, I'm Prem.

hero_bullet_1.description: First tag/bullet shown below the description

hero_bullet_2.description: Second tag/bullet shown below the description

hero_bullet_3.description: Third tag/bullet shown below the description

hero_image.description: Hero portrait or image displayed on the right side

hero_scroll_animation.description: Enable hero section scroll blur/fade animation on homepage

home_hero_width.description: Home hero section layout: full width or respecting page width

home_hero_background.description: Show background and border styling on home hero section

nav_layout.description: Navigation layout: fullscreen (with padding) or respecting page width

posts_layout.description: Posts display layout: grid, list (image left/content right), or carousel (horizontal scroll)
